Users deposit real xStocks ERC-20 tokens (xAAPL, xTSLA, \u2026) as         collateral and borrow up to 70 % of their current value in USDC.         Prices come from the xStocks API, pushed on-chain via PriceFeed.sol.  Rates (v1 \u2014 no per-block interest)  ------------------------------------  MAX_LTV            70 %   \u2014 max borrow against collateral  LIQ_THRESHOLD      78 %   \u2014 liquidation kicks in here  LIQ_BONUS           5 %   \u2014 liquidator reward  BORROW_FEE_BPS     50 bp  \u2014 one-time 0.5 % fee per borrow call  SCALE = 1e18  (token(18dec) * price(6dec) / 1e18 = params.usdcAmount: Gross USDC to borrow before the 0.5% fee.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

borrow(address,uint256).notice: Borrow USDC against deposited collateral (up to 70% LTV).

depositAndBorrow(address,uint256,uint256.notice: Deposit collateral and borrow USDC in one transaction.

liquidate(address,address).notice: Liquidate an undercollateralised position.         Liquidator repays all USDC debt and receives collateral + 5% bonus.

withdraw(address,uint256).notice: Withdraw collateral not backing outstanding debt.
